description: Scanned front of Cambodian national identity card; photo, DOB, and Phnom Penh residential address visible.
Passport biodata page; holder born in Battambang; machine-readable zone legible; issued 2021.
Driver license Class B; expiry 2028; residential address listed as Siem Reap province.
EDC electricity bill for March; customer name, meter ID, and Tuol Kork service address shown.
National ID card scan; photo left, DOB 15/03/1988, address St. 271 Phnom Penh.
National ID card scan; photo left, DOB 15/03/1988, address St. 271 Phnom Penh.
Bank statement PDF pages 1–3; recurring salary credits and monthly utility debits highlighted.
Water authority bill; subscriber name matches KYC; Chbar Ampov branch payment stamp present.
National ID rear side; barcode and fingerprint notation visible; slight edge crop on scan.
Passport entry/exit stamps for Thailand and Vietnam; consistent with stated travel history.
Driver license renewal receipt attached; old card number cross-referenced in notes.
Bank statement Q2; large inbound wire annotated as family remittance from abroad.
Utility bill PPWSA; account number ends in 7742; billing period February.
National ID; hologram glare on upper right; DOB and commune of birth readable.
EDC electricity bill dated last month; subscriber Sok Channary; Tuol Kork district.
EDC electricity bill dated last month; subscriber Sok Channary; Tuol Kork district.
Passport; child dependent listed in remarks; guardian consent form on file.
Bank statement; employer 'TechBridge Solutions' visible in salary line description.
EDC bill; peak consumption month; same premise ID as mortgage collateral file.
Gas cylinder delivery invoice used as auxiliary address proof; matches national ID commune.
Cooperative membership certificate; supplementary to primary national ID for rural client.
Lease agreement first page; landlord ID cross-checked; property in Daun Penh.
Salary certificate on company letterhead; wet signature; matches three months of credits.
Tax registration certificate (TIN letter); business address aligned with utility bill.
Vehicle registration card; VIN matches loan collateral schedule for auto facility.
Insurance policy schedule; beneficiary matches applicant; policy number quoted in CRM.
Court fee receipt; uncommon doc type; escalated to compliance for source-of-address rationale.
Student ID from Royal University of Phnom Penh; used for education loan KYC package.
Marriage certificate copy; name change narrative linked to prior national ID number.
Village chief certification letter; handwritten Khmer; notarized copy uploaded.
